$about: Manually adjudicated replication edges + stub Bob declarations that the wiki-CSV miner cannot infer alone. `bobs` is a list of {name, note} entries for Bobs known to exist in prose but with parent unknown (typically gen-8+ Bobs whose parentage tracks under issue #5). `edges` matches data/edges_replication.json. Merged by scripts/consolidate_bobs.py after the auto-mined edges. Each entry MUST cite the chapter and the prose evidence.

bobs.name: Mack
bobs.note: Referenced as parent of Isaac/Jack/Owen (B3C18) and as the pilot delivering three colony ships to 82 Eridani (wiki row 160). Mack's own parentage is unknown — gen-8+ extraction tracked under issue #5. Bootstrapped here so the Isaac/Jack/Owen edges resolve cleanly.

edges.source_text: Isaac, Jack, and Owen popped in. … Original Bob had always been a bit button-down, so it was surprising to see the same variation in three clones at the same time.
edges.note: B3C18 prose confirms Isaac/Jack/Owen are Mack's clones (explicit phrase 'three clones'). Pilots the three colony ships arriving at 82 Eridani per wiki row 160. Adjudicated under issue #4.
